MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

Both sides previously waived appearance for this date's proceedings.

At 9:30 AM a venire of 126 prospective jurors is assembled in the Jury Assembly room. Roll call is taken and attendance marked. Clerk administers Acknowledgment and
Agreement to Prospective Trial Jurors Assigned for Voir Dire.

Judge Gerardo Sandoval addresses and instructs the venire. Fifty-one (51) prospective jurors are excused for hardship. Seventy-five (75) prospective jurors are excused and ordered to return to Department 624 (for vior dire only) on July 13, 2021 at 9:00 AM for further jury selection.

Jury trial is continued to July 13, 2021 at 9:00 AM in Deparmtne 608. Jury selection (Voir Dire phase) will be conducted in Department 624, a larger courtroom to for social distancing measures given the COVID-19 pandemic. Prospective jurors are instructed to report to Dept. 624 at 9:00 AM on July 13, 2021.

Judge: Gerardo Sandoval; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported (D608)
